title: cert.identity Facet
description: Demanded by the cert-issuer Connector's Syncer (charter §2.1 'cert' Entity, §2.4 Intent/Certificate GA, ADR-0030): the identifying attributes of an issued X.509 certificate, projected from the CLM. A Facet schema exists only when a shipping Contract demands it (§1.1); validated at the Projector write path.
